title: CLI Command Register Schema
description: JSON Schema for FedRAMP 20x CLI command registration entries — defines the structure of validation commands, their KSI mappings, and execution metadata.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when the command register was generated

commands.description: Array of registered CLI validation commands

command_id.description: Unique identifier for the CLI command

ksi_id.description: KSI control identifier this command validates (e.g., KSI-IAM-01)

ksi_category.description: Category grouping for the KSI (e.g., Identity & Access Management)

command.description: The CLI command string to execute

description.description: Human-readable description of what this command validates

service.description: AWS service or system targeted by this command

expected_result.description: Expected output or condition for a PASS result

severity.description: Severity level if this validation fails

frequency.description: How often this command should be executed (e.g., daily, hourly, on-change)
